Test Case: Register new user with valid data
Preconditions: System is running; registration page is accessible; MongoDB is connected
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /register page
2. Enter valid Name, Email, and Password
3. Click 'Sign Up'
Test Data:
Name: Test User
Email: test@example.com
Password: SecurePass123
Expected Output: Account created successfully; user redirected to login page; password securely hashed in DB
Actual Output: Account created successfully; redirected to login; hash verified in DB

Preconditions: User with email already exists in MongoDB
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /register
2. Enter an already-registered email address
3. Fill remaining fields
4. Click 'Sign Up'
Expected Output: System displays error message: 'Email is already registered'. Registration blocked.
Actual Output: Error message displayed; duplicate registration prevented

Preconditions: User account registered in the system
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /login page
2. Enter valid registered email
3. Enter correct password
4. Click 'Login'
Expected Output: User is authenticated successfully; redirected to Shop page
Actual Output: User authenticated successfully; redirected to Shop page

Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /login page
2. Enter valid registered email
3. Enter INCORRECT password
4. Click 'Login'
Expected Output: System displays error message: 'Invalid email or password'. User remains on login page.
Actual Output: Error message displayed correctly; login rejected

Test Case: Add product to cart from Shop page
Preconditions: User is on Shop page; Products are loaded
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /shop
2. Click 'Add to Cart' on 'Organic Fresh Farm Basket'
3. Observe cart counter in header
Expected Output: Cart counter in header increments by 1; Product is added to LocalStorage cart state
Actual Output: Cart counter updated to 1; item added to local storage state

Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Click the Cart icon in the header
2. Review items and total price
Test Data: Cart items: 1x Organic Fresh Farm Basket (₹500)
Expected Output: Cart page displays the item with quantity 1; Total is correctly calculated as ₹500.00
Actual Output: Cart page displays item; total calculated correctly

Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /cart
2. Click 'Remove' next to the product
3. Observe cart state
Expected Output: Product is removed from cart; Total is recalculated; 'Your cart is empty' message displayed if no items remain
Actual Output: Product removed; cart empty message displayed

Test Case: Navigate to dynamic category page with placeholders
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to /shop
2. Click on 'Healthy Breakfast' category
3. Observe products displayed
Expected Output: User redirected to /category/breakfast; Page displays 3 placeholder sample products with default images
Actual Output: Redirected correctly; 3 sample products displayed with placeholder images

Preconditions: Language switcher is available in footer
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Scroll to footer Quick Links
2. Select 'தமிழ் (Tamil)' from language dropdown
3. Scroll up and observe text
Expected Output: Header nav links, Hero text, and Feedback area translate to Tamil. LocalStorage saves preference.
Actual Output: Text translated to Tamil immediately; preference saved in LocalStorage

Preconditions: Feedback area rendered on Home page
Steps to Execute Test Case:
1. Navigate to Home page
2. Scroll to Feedback Area
3. Enter text in feedback textarea
4. Click 'Submit Feedback'
Expected Output: Form submission triggers (UI handles submit). Required validation prevents empty submission.
Actual Output: Required validation works; UI handles click
